[Previous Feedback] The created_at timestamps are not in the correct format. Each task's created_at should look like: 2026-03-16T09:00:00+08:00
Keep this in mind as you continue with the next task.

Alex has decided to add a new task to the sprint: review the third-party OAuth integration proposal. Assign it to Bai with a deadline of this Wednesday at 6:00 PM. Please add this new task to day01/sprint_tasks.json with id T-405, and include both created_at and due_date fields.
